{{Quote|The Centerpoint Party. Extremists who have borrowed freely from the rhetoric of the old Sacorrian Triad.|[[Ebrihim]]|<ref name="AoC2:JE">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref>}}
The '''Centerpoint Party''' was a political faction formed in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] during the early stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] by an alliance of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeologists]] forcibly removed from [[Centerpoint Station]] and also by independent-minded [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]]. They insisted that, due to the nature of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] containing five self-sustaining worlds, Corellia should be given five votes in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] as opposed to one. As such, the archaeologists hoped to be able to stop the use of Centerpoint Station as a weapon, whereas the Corellians hoped to be able to shape New Republic policy.

Following the [[Battle of Fondor]], [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] took control of the party, and soon thereafter its membership and influence in the sector swelled. He attempted to sign a treaty of friendship with the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] that would ensure the neutral independence of the Corellian Sector in return for aiding the Yuuzhan Vong in hunting Jedi. Instead, [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] forced Sal-Solo to become President of the [[Peace Brigade]]. When the party learned of this, they ejected him from the party, stripped him of citizenship, and exiled him from the Sector.

After [[Assassination of Thrackan Sal-Solo|the assassination of President Thrackan Sal-Solo]], the Centerpoint Party served an advisory role in the coalition government formed to govern Corellia.

During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], [[Sadras Koyan]] was a member.
